scenarios.persona: Customer looking for hoodies, wants to see details then close
messages: hey, do you have any hoodies?
what colors does it come in?
ok close that, show me the Oversized Hoodie instead

scenarios.persona: Customer asking for items that are out of stock
messages: I want a Zip-Up Hoodie in black
ok what tshirts do you have in stock then?

scenarios.persona: Budget shopper with strict price limit
messages: what do you have under 25 euro?
close it, what else is under 25?
do you have anything under 30 in clothing?

scenarios.persona: Customer comparing jackets
messages: what's the difference between the Bomber and the Track Jacket?
how many sizes do you have?
close it, open the Track Jacket

scenarios.persona: Shopper who needs XXL size
messages: do you have anything in XXL?
show me the Oversized Hoodie in XXL
wait does it come in XXL?

scenarios.persona: Customer browsing accessories one by one
messages: close it, show me the Dad Cap
is it one size fits all?
show me the Canvas Tote Bag

scenarios.persona: Customer looking for specific colors across categories
messages: do you have anything in forest green?
show me the forest green beanie
show me the Classic Hoodie in navy

scenarios.persona: Buying a gift, unsure what to get
messages: I'm looking for a gift for a friend who likes streetwear
she wears size S and likes neutral colors
nice, close it and show me sweatshirts in size S
how many are left in stock?
what would you recommend as a gift under 50?

scenarios.persona: Customer asking policy questions then shopping
messages: what payment methods do you accept?

scenarios.persona: Customer rapidly opening and closing multiple cards
messages: close it, open the Oversized Tee
close that too, show me the Graphic Tee

scenarios.persona: Customer asking for a cap directly (no tab switch), adds it, checks cart
Customer adding items to cart and checking cart contents
messages: add the Classic Hoodie to my cart
add the Oversized Tee to my cart

scenarios.persona: Customer adding then removing items from cart
messages: add the first one to my cart
add the second one to my cart too
actually remove the first one, I changed my mind
what do I have left in cart?

scenarios.persona: Customer checking how many items are in the cart
messages: add the Classic Hoodie to my cart
add the Ribbed Scarf to my cart
how many items do I have in my cart?
how many products did I add?

scenarios.persona: Customer asks agent to show and hide the cart panel
messages: add the Oversized Hoodie to my cart
add the Beanie to my cart

scenarios.persona: Full shopping flow: browse, expand, add to cart, check out
messages: add the first sweatshirt to my cart
remove the jacket from my cart

scenarios.persona: Customer adds items then changes quantities
messages: add the Dad Cap to my cart
add the Beanie to my cart
set the Dad Cap back to 1

scenarios.persona: Customer who ends session with various farewell phrases
messages: nice, add the Classic Hoodie to my cart

scenarios.persona: Customer using ambiguous phrasing to add quantity (STT transcription issue)
messages: add the Dad Cap to my cart
ok remove the cap from my cart

scenarios.persona: Customer managing cart: add, update qty, then remove
messages: add the Basic Tee to my cart
add the Beanie to my cart
change the Basic Tee quantity to 2
I changed my mind, remove the Basic Tee

scenarios.persona: Customer adds sized clothing — agent asks size. Then adds accessory — agent skips size question.
messages: add the Classic Hoodie to my cart
add the Beanie to my cart

scenarios.persona: Customer asks to 'show me my cart' — agent should open cart panel AND read contents aloud
messages: add the Classic Hoodie to my cart
add the Dad Cap to my cart

scenarios.persona: Customer adds two sized clothing items — agent asks size each time, then accessory no size
messages: add the Essential Sweatshirt to my cart
add the Basic Tee to my cart
add the Ribbed Scarf to my cart

scenarios.persona: Customer uses 'go back', 'back', 'return' — should close card, NOT trigger search
Customer asks about empty cart before adding anything, then adds item
messages: add the Oversized Tee to my cart

scenarios.persona: Customer adds sized item, then changes mind before giving size, then adds accessory
messages: add the Oversized Hoodie to my cart
actually never mind, show me accessories instead
add the Canvas Tote Bag to my cart

scenarios.persona: Full flow: browse, add sized item, add accessory, update qty, remove, checkout total
messages: add the Beanie to my cart
remove the jacket from my cart
what's left and what's the total?
